modules.module_title: Safe Food Handling Practices (Receiving, Storage, Preparation)
Waste Management, FSSAI Compliance & Emergency Procedures

questions.question: FSSAI ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India
options.B: Food Security and Supply Authority of India
options.C: Food Storage and Safety Association of India
options.D: Food Science and Standards Agency of India

questions.explanation: FSSAI ka full form Food Safety and Standards Authority of India hai, jo India mein food safety regulations banata hai.

questions.question: Food Safety Act kis saal mein implement hua?
questions.explanation: Food Safety and Standards Act (FSSA) 2006 mein enact kiya gaya tha.

questions.question: Ek food handler ke liye food safety guidelines follow karna kyun zaruri hai?

options.B: Legal compliance ke liye
options.C: Foodborne illnesses se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Food safety guidelines follow karna customer satisfaction, legal compliance aur foodborne illnesses se bachne ke liye bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Foodborne illness ka sabse common cause kya hai?

options.B: Improper food handling

questions.explanation: Foodborne illnesses ka sabse common cause improper food handling practices hain, jaise galat temperature par store karna ya cross-contamination.

questions.question: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) kya hai?

options.B: Ek food safety management system

questions.explanation: HACCP ek systematic preventive approach hai jo food safety ko biological, chemical aur physical hazards se address karta hai.

questions.question: FSSAI license kisko lena mandatory hai?

options.B: Sirf bade restaurants ko

questions.explanation: FSSAI license ya registration sabhi Food Business Operators (FBOs) ke liye mandatory hai, chahe woh kitne bhi bade ya chhote hon.

questions.question: FSSAI ke logo mein kya message hota hai?

options.B: Good Food, Good Health

questions.explanation: FSSAI ke logo mein 'Safe Food, Healthy India' ka message hota hai.

questions.question: Food safety ke '3 C's' kya hain?

options.B: Cover, Cool, Consume

questions.explanation: Food safety ke '3 C's' hain Clean (personal hygiene aur surfaces), Cook (thoroughly cooking food) aur Chill (refrigerating food promptly).

questions.question: Food safety officer kya role play karta hai?

options.B: Food business ki quality check karna aur regulations enforce karna

questions.explanation: Food Safety Officer ka role food businesses ki quality check karna, inspections karna aur FSSAI regulations ko enforce karna hai.

questions.question: Foodborne illness ke symptoms kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Headache, body ache, cough

questions.explanation: Foodborne illness ke common symptoms mein fever, nausea, vomiting aur diarrhea shamil hain.

questions.question: FSSAI registration aur FSSAI license mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Registration chhote businesses ke liye hai, license bade businesses ke liye
options.B: Registration permanent hai, license temporary
options.C: Registration online hota hai, license offline

questions.explanation: FSSAI registration chhote food businesses (annual turnover < 12 Lakhs) ke liye hai, jabki license bade businesses (annual turnover > 12 Lakhs) ke liye mandatory hai.

questions.question: Food adulteration kya hai?

options.A: Food ko sahi temperature par store karna
options.B: Food mein koi harmful ya inferior substance milana
options.C: Food ko attractive banane ke liye colour add karna

questions.explanation: Food adulteration ka matlab hai food mein koi harmful, inferior ya unnecessary substance milana, jo uski quality aur safety ko compromise karta hai.

questions.question: Ek food business operator (FBO) ki primary responsibility kya hai?

options.B: Consumers ko safe aur wholesome food provide karna

questions.explanation: Ek FBO ki primary responsibility hai consumers ko safe aur wholesome food provide karna aur FSSAI regulations ko follow karna.

questions.question: Food safety training kyun important hai food handlers ke liye?

options.B: Unhe food safety practices ki knowledge dene ke liye
options.C: Unhe naye dishes banana sikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Food safety training food handlers ko sahi practices aur regulations ki knowledge provide karti hai, jisse woh safe food handle kar saken.

questions.question: FSSAI ka 'Eat Right India' movement ka kya aim hai?

options.B: Food waste reduce karna
options.C: Healthy aur sustainable food choices ko promote karna
options.D: International food cuisines ko promote karna

questions.explanation: FSSAI ka 'Eat Right India' movement ka aim hai citizens ko healthy aur sustainable food choices banane ke liye empower karna.

questions.question: Food safety regulations ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Food businesses se revenue generate karna
options.B: Public health ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Food safety regulations ka main purpose public health ko foodborne illnesses aur unsafe food practices se protect karna hai.

questions.question: FSSAI ke standards kis type ke food products par apply hote hain?

options.B: Sirf fresh produce

questions.explanation: FSSAI ke standards India mein sabhi types ke food products par apply hote hain, chahe woh packaged hon, unpackaged hon ya processed hon.

questions.question: Food handling se pehle aur baad mein haath dhona kyun zaruri hai?

options.A: Haathon ko fresh feel karane ke liye
options.B: Germs aur bacteria ko food mein transfer hone se rokne ke liye
options.C: Haathon ko clean dikhane ke liye
options.D: Sirf garam paani waste karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Haath dhona germs aur bacteria ko food mein transfer hone se rokne ka sabse effective tareeka hai, jisse foodborne illnesses ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Food handlers ko apni nails kaise rakhni chahiye?

options.B: Chhote aur clean

questions.explanation: Food handlers ko apni nails chhote, clean aur unpolished rakhni chahiye taaki dirt aur bacteria unmein na fase.

questions.question: Food preparation area mein food handler ko jewelry pehenna chahiye ya nahi?

options.A: Haan, choti ring pehen sakte hain
options.B: Nahi, sabhi jewelry utarni chahiye
options.C: Haan, agar gloves pehne hain toh

questions.explanation: Food preparation area mein koi bhi jewelry nahi pehenni chahiye, kyunki woh bacteria trap kar sakti hai ya food mein gir sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi food handler ko fever ya diarrhea hai, toh use kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Manager ko inform karke kaam se break lena chahiye
options.C: Sirf thoda rest lekar kaam continue karna chahiye
options.D: Apni shift change kar leni chahiye

questions.explanation: Fever ya diarrhea jaise symptoms hone par food handler ko turant manager ko inform karna chahiye aur food handling se door rehna chahiye taaki contamination na ho.

questions.question: Food handlers ko head covering kyun pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Baalon ko food mein girne se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Head covering (jaise hairnet ya cap) baalon ko food mein girne se rokta hai, jo ek physical hazard hai.

questions.question: Food handling karte samay gloves kab badalne chahiye?

options.B: Jab task change ho (e.g., raw meat se ready-to-eat food)

questions.explanation: Gloves ko tab badalna chahiye jab woh fat jayen, ya jab aap ek task se doosre task par shift ho, especially raw food se cooked food par.

questions.question: Cough ya sneeze karte samay food handler ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apne haathon se munh dhakna chahiye
options.B: Apni kohni (elbow) mein cough/sneeze karna chahiye
options.C: Door ghoom kar cough/sneeze karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Cough ya sneeze karte samay apni kohni mein dhakna chahiye taaki germs haathon se food mein na failen.

questions.question: Work uniform ko kitni baar dhona chahiye?

options.B: Jab ganda ho jaye
options.C: Har din ya jab bhi zaroorat ho

questions.explanation: Work uniform ko har din ya jab bhi zaroorat ho, dhona chahiye taaki woh clean aur hygienic rahe.

questions.question: Food handling area mein khana ya paani peena kyun allowed nahi hai?

options.A: Yeh manager ko pasand nahi hai
options.B: Food contamination ka risk badh jata hai
options.D: Yeh ek rule hai, reason nahi pata

questions.explanation: Food handling area mein khana ya paani peene se food contamination ka risk badh jata hai, kyunki particles ya saliva food mein gir sakte hain.

questions.question: Wound ya cut hone par food handler ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Waterproof bandage se cover karke gloves pehenne chahiye
options.C: Sirf ek normal bandage lagana chahiye

questions.explanation: Wound ya cut ko waterproof bandage se cover karna chahiye aur phir gloves pehenne chahiye taaki bacteria food mein na failen.

questions.question: Food preparation area mein smoking kyun prohibited hai?

options.B: Ash aur germs food mein gir sakte hain
options.D: Smell se food ka taste kharab hota hai

questions.explanation: Smoking se ash aur germs food mein gir sakte hain, jisse contamination ka risk hota hai.

questions.question: Personal hygiene mein sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Regularly haath dhona

questions.explanation: Regularly aur sahi tareeke se haath dhona personal hygiene ka sabse important step hai food safety ke liye.

questions.question: Food handler ko apni health condition ke baare mein manager ko kab inform karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab use foodborne illness ke symptoms dikhen
options.C: Jab woh kaam par nahi aa sake
options.D: Jab uski family mein koi bimar ho

questions.explanation: Food handler ko turant manager ko inform karna chahiye agar use foodborne illness ke symptoms dikhen, taaki contamination ka risk minimize ho.

questions.question: Food handlers ko nose-picking aur ear-picking se kyun bachna chahiye?

options.B: Germs haathon par transfer ho sakte hain aur phir food mein
options.C: Yeh sirf ek bad habit hai
options.D: Isse food ka smell kharab hota hai

questions.explanation: Nose-picking aur ear-picking se germs haathon par transfer ho sakte hain, jo baad mein food ko contaminate kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Food safety ke liye kis type ke shoes pehenne chahiye?

options.B: Heels wale shoes

questions.explanation: Closed-toe, non-slip shoes pehenne chahiye taaki pair protect rahen aur accidents (jaise girna) se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar kisi food handler ko skin infection hai toh use kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Manager ko inform karke medical attention leni chahiye
options.D: Dusre section mein kaam karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Skin infection hone par turant manager ko inform karna chahiye aur medical attention leni chahiye. Jab tak infection theek na ho, food handling se door rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Food handlers ko apni shift ke dauran kitni baar haath dhone chahiye?

options.A: Sirf shuruat mein aur ant mein
options.B: Har task change karne par aur jab bhi zaroorat ho

questions.explanation: Food handlers ko har task change karne par, contamination ke baad, aur jab bhi zaroorat ho, haath dhone chahiye.

questions.question: Perishable food items ko receive karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Temperature

questions.explanation: Perishable items receive karte samay packaging, temperature, aur expiry date teeno check karna bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Raw meat ko kitne temperature par store karna chahiye?

options.B: 10°C se 15°C ke beech

questions.explanation: Raw meat ko refrigerator mein 0°C se 5°C ke beech store karna chahiye taaki bacteria ki growth slow ho.

questions.question: Dry storage area mein food items ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Shelves par, zameen se thoda upar

questions.explanation: Dry storage area mein food items ko shelves par, zameen se kam se kam 6 inches (15 cm) upar store karna chahiye taaki pests aur moisture se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: FIFO method ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Food In, Food Out

questions.explanation: FIFO (First-In, First-Out) ka matlab hai ki jo item pehle store kiya gaya hai, use pehle use karna chahiye, jisse spoilage kam hota hai.

questions.question: Danger Zone temperature range kya hai jahan bacteria tezi se grow karte hain?

options.B: 5°C se 60°C

questions.explanation: Food Danger Zone 5°C se 60°C ke beech hota hai, jahan bacteria bahut tezi se multiply hote hain.

questions.question: Cooked food ko kitni der tak Danger Zone mein rakha ja sakta hai, maximum?

options.B: 2 ghante

questions.explanation: Cooked food ko Danger Zone (5°C-60°C) mein maximum 2 ghante tak hi rakha ja sakta hai. Uske baad ya toh use reheat karna chahiye ya discard karna chahiye.

questions.question: Thawing (defrosting) ka sabse safe method kya hai?

options.B: Refrigerator mein
options.D: Microwave mein (agar turant cook karna ho)

questions.explanation: Thawing ka sabse safe method hai frozen food ko refrigerator mein rakhna. Microwave mein bhi kar sakte hain, lekin use turant cook karna hoga.

questions.question: Cooked food ko reheat karte samay kis internal temperature tak garam karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Cooked food ko reheat karte samay kam se kam 74°C tak garam karna chahiye aur us temperature par kam se kam 15 seconds ke liye hold karna chahiye.

questions.question: Food ko chill karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Bade containers mein ek saath chill karna
options.B: Chhote portions mein divide karke shallow containers mein chill karna
options.C: Garam food ko seedhe freezer mein rakhna
options.D: Room temperature par rakhe rehne dena

questions.explanation: Food ko chhote portions mein divide karke shallow containers mein chill karna chahiye taaki woh jaldi thanda ho sake aur Danger Zone mein kam samay rahe.

questions.question: Food thermometer ka use kyun important hai?

options.A: Food ka taste check karne ke liye
options.B: Food ke internal temperature ko measure karne ke liye
options.C: Food ka color check karne ke liye
options.D: Food ka weight check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Food thermometer food ke internal temperature ko accurately measure karne ke liye important hai, jisse confirm ho sake ki food sahi tarah se pakka hai ya thanda hua hai.

questions.question: Fruits aur vegetables ko use karne se pehle kaise clean karna chahiye?

options.B: Soap se dhona
options.C: Running tap water se thoroughly wash karna

questions.explanation: Fruits aur vegetables ko running tap water se thoroughly wash karna chahiye taaki dirt, pesticides aur surface bacteria nikal jayen.

questions.question: Food ko store karte samay containers kaise hone chahiye?

options.B: Airtight aur food-grade

questions.explanation: Food ko airtight aur food-grade containers mein store karna chahiye taaki contamination se bacha ja sake aur freshness bani rahe.

questions.question: Rice ko cook karne ke baad jaldi thanda karna kyun zaruri hai?

options.B: Bacillus cereus bacteria ke growth ko rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cooked rice ko jaldi thanda karna zaruri hai kyunki isme Bacillus cereus naam ka bacteria grow kar sakta hai agar ise Danger Zone mein lambe samay tak rakha jaye.

questions.question: Deliver kiya gaya food kab reject karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab packaging damaged ho ya temperature galat ho

questions.explanation: Deliver kiya gaya food tab reject karna chahiye jab packaging damaged ho, expiry date nikal gayi ho ya uska temperature food safety standards ke mutabik na ho.

questions.question: Food ko display karte samay kis temperature par maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Hot food ko 60°C se upar aur cold food ko 5°C se niche
options.B: Hot food ko 50°C aur cold food ko 10°C

questions.explanation: Hot food ko display karte samay 60°C se upar aur cold food ko 5°C se niche maintain karna chahiye taaki Danger Zone se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Shelf life badhane ke liye food preservation methods kya hain?

options.B: Sirf seasoning add karna

questions.explanation: Food preservation methods jaise refrigeration, freezing, drying aur canning food ki shelf life badhate hain aur spoilage ko rokte hain.

questions.question: Cooked food ko kab tak refrigerator mein safely store kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: 3-4 din tak

questions.explanation: Cooked food ko refrigerator mein 3-4 din tak safely store kiya ja sakta hai. Uske baad use consume kar lena chahiye ya discard kar dena chahiye.

questions.question: Cross-contamination kya hai?

options.A: Ek food item ka doosre food item se mix hona
options.B: Harmful bacteria ka ek food item se doosre food item mein transfer hona
options.C: Food ka galat tarike se pakana

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ka matlab hai harmful bacteria ka ek food item (especially raw food) se doosre food item (especially ready-to-eat food) mein transfer hona.

questions.question: Cross-contamination rokne ka sabse acha tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Sabhi food items ko ek saath rakhna
options.B: Raw aur cooked food ke liye alag cutting boards aur utensils use karna
options.D: Ek hi sponge se sab kuch saaf karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination rokne ke liye raw aur cooked food ke liye alag cutting boards, utensils aur equipment use karna bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Refrigerator mein raw meat ko kahan store karna chahiye?

options.B: Sabse niche shelf par

questions.explanation: Raw meat ko hamesha refrigerator mein sabse niche shelf par store karna chahiye taaki uska juice tapak kar niche ke food items ko contaminate na kare.

questions.question: Food allergens kya hote hain?

options.A: Food jo jaldi kharab ho jate hain
options.B: Substances jo sensitive individuals mein allergic reactions cause karte hain
options.D: Food jo expire ho gaye hain

questions.explanation: Food allergens aise substances hote hain jo kuch sensitive individuals mein immune system reaction (allergic reaction) trigger karte hain.

questions.question: India mein major food allergens kaun se hain?

options.A: Milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, wheat, soy, fish, shellfish
options.B: Salt, sugar, pepper

questions.explanation: India mein bhi worldwide common food allergens ki list apply hoti hai, jaise milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, wheat, soy, fish, aur shellfish.

questions.question: Allergen-free food prepare karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Alag utensils aur cutting boards use karna
options.C: Allergen wale food ke saath prepare karna

questions.explanation: Allergen-free food prepare karte samay alag utensils, cutting boards aur equipment use karna chahiye taaki cross-contact se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Cutting board ko raw meat ke liye use karne ke baad kaise clean karna chahiye?

options.B: Garam sabun ke paani se dhokar sanitize karna
options.D: Agli baar use hone tak chhod dena

questions.explanation: Cutting board ko raw meat ke liye use karne ke baad garam sabun ke paani se thoroughly dhokar sanitize karna bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Food handlers ko allergens ke baare mein knowledge kyun honi chahiye?

options.A: Taki woh customers ko sahi information de saken
options.B: Taki woh apne ingredients ko samajh saken
options.C: Taki woh allergic reactions se bach saken

questions.explanation: Food handlers ko allergens ki knowledge honi chahiye taaki woh customers ko sahi information de saken, cross-contact rok saken aur allergic reactions se bach saken.

questions.question: Agar kisi customer ko severe allergic reaction ho jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant medical help bulani chahiye

questions.explanation: Severe allergic reaction ek medical emergency hai. Turant medical help (ambulance) bulani chahiye.

questions.question: Raw chicken ko vegetables ke upar store karna sahi hai ya galat?

options.B: Galat hai
options.C: Agar pack kiya ho toh sahi hai

questions.explanation: Galat hai. Raw chicken ko hamesha sabse niche store karna chahiye taaki uska juice tapak kar vegetables ko contaminate na kare.

questions.question: Food labels par allergen information kyun dena mandatory hai?

options.A: Customers ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Allergic individuals ko safe food choices banane mein help karne ke liye
options.C: Product ko attractive banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Food labels par allergen information dena mandatory hai taaki allergic individuals ko sahi jankari mile aur woh apne liye safe food choose kar saken.

questions.question: Food preparation area mein alag alag rang ke cutting boards ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Kitchen ko colorful banane ke liye
options.B: Cross-contamination rokne ke liye alag food types ke liye
options.C: Har chef ka apna board hota hai

questions.explanation: Alag alag rang ke cutting boards (jaise red for raw meat, green for vegetables) cross-contamination rokne mein help karte hain by designating specific boards for specific food types.

questions.question: Agar koi utensil raw chicken ke liye use kiya gaya hai, toh kya usse turant salad banane ke liye use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Nahi, pehle dhokar sanitize karna hoga
options.C: Sirf paani se dho kar use kar sakte hain
options.D: Agar chicken pakka hua ho toh kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Nahi. Utensil ko raw chicken ke liye use karne ke baad, use achhe se dhokar sanitize karna hoga, tabhi use ready-to-eat food ke liye use kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Allergens ko store karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Normal food items ke saath store karna
options.B: Separate, labeled containers mein store karna

questions.explanation: Allergens ko hamesha separate, air-tight aur labeled containers mein store karna chahiye taaki cross-contact se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Kya ek small amount of allergen bhi allergic reaction trigger kar sakta hai?

options.A: Nahi, sirf bade amounts hi reaction karte hain
options.B: Haan, kuch logon ke liye bahut kam amount bhi severe reaction kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Haan, kuch logon ke liye, allergens ki bahut kam matra (trace amounts) bhi severe allergic reaction trigger kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Food handlers ko customer se allergen related queries par kya response dena chahiye?

options.B: Agar sure na ho toh 'I don't know' bolna chahiye
options.C: Manager ya trained staff ko refer karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Allergen related queries par food handlers ko manager ya specially trained staff ko refer karna chahiye, kyunki galat information dangerous ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ke physical sources kya ho sakte hain?

options.A: Dirty hands, unclean utensils, contaminated cutting boards
options.B: Airborne dust

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ke physical sources mein dirty hands, unclean utensils, contaminated cutting boards aur surfaces shamil hain.

questions.question: Cleaning aur sanitizing mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Cleaning dirt hatati hai, sanitizing germs ko kill karta hai
options.C: Sanitizing dirt hatata hai, cleaning germs kill karta hai
options.D: Cleaning sirf paani se hoti hai, sanitizing chemical se

questions.explanation: Cleaning ka matlab hai dirt, grease aur food particles ko hatana. Sanitizing ka matlab hai germs aur bacteria ko ek safe level tak reduce karna.

questions.question: Sanitizer use karne se pehle surface ko clean karna kyun zaruri hai?

options.A: Sanitizer ki smell hatane ke liye
options.B: Sanitizer ko effective banane ke liye, kyunki dirt uske kaam ko rok sakti hai

questions.explanation: Sanitizer ko effective banane ke liye surface ko pehle clean karna zaruri hai. Dirt aur food particles sanitizer ke contact ko germs tak pahunchne se rok sakte hain.

questions.question: Dishwashing ke liye two-sink method mein kya steps hote hain?

options.B: Wash, Sanitize

questions.explanation: Manual dishwashing ke liye four-step process hai: Scrape, Wash, Rinse, Sanitize, Air Dry. Option C is the closest correct one for the core steps.

questions.question: Pest control ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Food ko khula chhod dena
options.C: Kitchen ko clean aur tidy rakhna

questions.explanation: Pest control ke liye sabse important step hai kitchen aur storage areas ko clean, tidy aur food-free rakhna, jisse pests attract na hon.

questions.question: Cockroaches aur rodents food business ke liye kya threat pose karte hain?

options.B: Woh foodborne diseases faila sakte hain

questions.explanation: Cockroaches aur rodents foodborne pathogens carry karte hain aur foodborne diseases faila sakte hain.

questions.question: Food preparation surfaces ko kitni baar sanitize karna chahiye?

options.B: Har use ke baad ya jab bhi zaroorat ho

questions.explanation: Food preparation surfaces ko har use ke baad ya jab bhi task change ho, sanitize karna chahiye taaki cross-contamination na ho.

questions.question: Cleaning chemicals ko kahan store karna chahiye?

options.B: Food preparation area mein
options.C: Alag, labeled aur locked area mein

questions.explanation: Cleaning chemicals ko hamesha food items se door, alag, labeled aur locked area mein store karna chahiye taaki accidental contamination ya mis-use na ho.

questions.question: Mop buckets aur brooms ko kahan store karna chahiye?

options.B: Food storage area mein

questions.explanation: Mop buckets aur brooms jaise cleaning equipment ko designated cleaning supply area mein store karna chahiye, food handling areas se door.

questions.question: Pest activity ke signs kya ho sakte hain?

options.A: Droppings, gnaw marks, nests, strange smells
options.B: Food ka kam ho jana

questions.explanation: Pest activity ke signs mein droppings, gnaw marks, nests aur strange smells shamil hain.

questions.question: Sanitizer solution ki strength kaise check karni chahiye?

options.B: Usko smell karke

questions.explanation: Sanitizer solution ki strength ko check karne ke liye hamesha test strips use karni chahiye taaki woh effective ho aur safe bhi.

questions.question: Kitchen equipment ko regularly clean na karne se kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Equipment ki life badh jati hai
options.B: Bacteria aur germs grow kar sakte hain, jisse food contamination ka risk hota hai
options.D: Food ka taste better hota hai

questions.explanation: Kitchen equipment ko regularly clean na karne se bacteria aur germs grow kar sakte hain, jo foodborne illnesses ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Integrated Pest Management (IPM) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pests ko control karne ke liye comprehensive approach (sanitation, exclusion, chemical control)

questions.explanation: Integrated Pest Management (IPM) pests ko control karne ka ek comprehensive approach hai jisme sanitation, exclusion (entry points block karna) aur chemical control (agar zaroori ho) shamil hain.

questions.question: Food processing areas mein windows aur doors ko kaise secure karna chahiye?

options.B: Screen laga kar aur tightly close rakhna chahiye
options.C: Sirf raat mein band karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Windows aur doors par screens lagani chahiye aur unhe tightly close rakhna chahiye taaki pests andar na aa saken.

questions.question: Garbage bins ko kitni baar empty karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab woh bhar jayen ya daily

questions.explanation: Garbage bins ko regularly empty karna chahiye, ideally jab woh bhar jayen ya din ke ant mein, taaki pests attract na hon aur badboo na aaye.

questions.question: Cleaning schedules banana kyun important hai?

options.B: Taki sabhi areas regularly aur thoroughly clean hon
options.C: Staff ko busy rakhne ke liye
options.D: Cleaning products ko jaldi use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleaning schedules ensure karte hain ki sabhi areas aur equipment regularly aur thoroughly clean hon, jisse food safety standards maintain rahen.

questions.question: Food-contact surfaces ke liye kis type ke sanitizers use karne chahiye?

options.B: Bleach only
options.C: Food-grade sanitizers, as per FSSAI guidelines

questions.explanation: Food-contact surfaces ke liye hamesha FSSAI guidelines ke anusaar approved food-grade sanitizers ka hi upyog karna chahiye.

questions.question: Food waste ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Sealed bags mein aur designated waste bins mein

questions.explanation: Food waste ko sealed bags mein rakhkar designated waste bins mein dispose karna chahiye, jisse pests attract na hon aur badboo na failay.

questions.question: FSSAI compliance ke liye records maintain karna kyun zaruri hai?

options.A: Sirf paper work badhane ke liye
options.B: Inspections ke dauran proof provide karne ke liye aur accountability ke liye
options.C: Employees ko monitor karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Records maintain karna FSSAI inspections ke dauran proof provide karta hai ki food safety standards follow kiye ja rahe hain aur accountability bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Food recall kya hota hai?

options.A: Customer ko food ki yaad dilana
options.B: Market se unsafe food product ko wapas bulana

questions.explanation: Food recall ka matlab hai market se aise food product ko wapas bulana jo unsafe ho sakta hai ya FSSAI regulations ko comply nahi karta.

questions.question: Emergency situation (e.g., fire, power cut) mein food safety ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sab kuch chhod kar bhag jana chahiye
options.B: Food ko safe jagah par shift karna aur temperature monitor karna
options.C: Food ko open mein rakh dena chahiye
options.D: Customers ko food serve karte rehna chahiye

questions.explanation: Emergency mein food ko safe jagah par shift karna, perishable items ka temperature monitor karna aur agar zaroorat ho toh discard karna chahiye.

questions.question: Expired food items ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Thoda discount dekar bech dena chahiye
options.B: Turant discard karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Expired food items ko turant discard karna chahiye, kyunki woh unsafe ho sakte hain aur foodborne illnesses ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: FSSAI Food Safety Display Boards (FSDBs) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Customers ko food safety information aur FSSAI rating dikhana
options.D: Staff ke liye instructions display karna

questions.explanation: FSDBs customers ko food safety information, FSSAI license/registration number aur hygiene rating display karne ke liye hote hain, jisse transparency badhe.

questions.question: Complaint handling process mein food safety ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Complaint ko seriously lena, investigate karna aur action lena

questions.explanation: Complaint handling process mein complaint ko seriously lena, investigate karna, us par action lena aur future mein aisi galti na ho, yeh ensure karna bahut important hai.

questions.question: Food waste ko reduce karne ke kya tareeke hain?

options.B: Inventory management, proper storage, portion control
options.D: Sabhi food ko ek saath order karna

questions.explanation: Food waste reduce karne ke liye proper inventory management, sahi storage, portion control aur leftover food ka creative use karna important hai.

questions.question: FSSAI guidelines ke according, water supply ki quality kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Potable (peene layak) aur safe

questions.explanation: FSSAI guidelines ke anusaar, food business mein use hone wala pani potable (peene layak) aur safe hona chahiye, contamination-free.

questions.question: Agar FSSAI inspection mein non-compliance paya jaye toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Fine, license cancellation ya legal action ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: FSSAI inspection mein serious non-compliance paye jane par fine, license cancellation, ya legal action jaisi sakht karwai ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Food safety audit ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Food safety systems aur practices ki effectiveness evaluate karna

questions.explanation: Food safety audit ka purpose hai food safety systems aur practices ki effectiveness ko evaluate karna aur areas for improvement identify karna.

questions.question: Food business mein emergency contact numbers kahan display hone chahiye?

options.B: Publicly visible aur easily accessible jagah par

questions.explanation: Emergency contact numbers (police, fire, medical) publicly visible aur easily accessible jagah par display hone chahiye taaki zaroorat padne par turant contact kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Food Safety Management System (FSMS) ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Food safety risks ko identify aur control karta hai

questions.explanation: FSMS food safety risks ko identify, evaluate aur control karne mein help karta hai, jisse safe food production ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: FSSAI ke under ek food business ki hygiene rating kya signify karti hai?

options.B: Uske food safety aur hygiene standards ka level

questions.explanation: FSSAI hygiene rating ek food business ke food safety aur hygiene standards ka level signify karti hai, jo consumers ko informed choices banane mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Food packaging materials kaise hone chahiye?

options.B: Food-grade, non-toxic aur food ko protect karne wale

questions.explanation: Food packaging materials food-grade, non-toxic hone chahiye aur food ko external contamination se protect karne mein capable hone chahiye.

questions.question: Agar kisi food item mein glass ya metal ka tukda mil jaye toh yeh kis type ka hazard hai?

options.B: Chemical hazard

questions.explanation: Glass ya metal ka tukda food mein milna ek physical hazard hai, jo khane wale ko physically injure kar sakta hai.
